titleStmt.title: SII 24.78: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 78. (A.R. No. 36 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Damaged. Registers a sale of land free of taxes to Tiruvaraṅgamuḍaiyāṉ, an accountant of the sabhā of the temple. The details are lost. The record is dated in the 32nd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemi yaḷavun tan nemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅ kopparuvattu cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmunaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷa miriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟu
temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilap pāvai tanimaiyun tavira vantu punitaṟ ṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟc cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu veṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella ṭai Iru nila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal veṇ
ṭa vār kaṭa vāntarattup pūpar tiraiviṭu tanta kalañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan pon nakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟpiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭu
ṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta netikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭain toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirit talamaṟa kuṭaticai tannā ṭukantu tānun tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutuku payantetir māṟi Aiyap peruntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇka
ṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaik koṇṭiṇṭiya puka ḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅ kamum poru parittaraṅkaḷun tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṅ kaṭal paṭarvatu pol tan vip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta po
t tuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacara(ra)r tiriyum poccai veñcura meṟṟik koṟṟa [ vijayastampam] ticai toṟum niṟutti muttin calāpamu muttamiṭ potiyi karipaṭu maiyyaccaiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai
koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka
kesari kolottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 32 Āvatu ṟttu cellūr cellūruṭaiyān
tiruveṅkaṭap piccarum nālūr tan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkanum pāratāyan Ārāvamu
van periyānum patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvayiṣṇava yum Uḷḷi
tta nanantanārāyaṇa paṭṭar Evalpaṭi
kkuk kiḻa vāykkālu kku teṟku ttukku meṟku
veli Oṉṟukku paḷḷi koṇṭān marakkālāl Eṇ Onṟāka nilam Onṟaraikku kācu Onṟaraiyum
nilattukku periya Anan=ta nārāyaṇanampi yaṟuttu varukaiyi
Epperppaṭṭanavum ceyyakkaṭavitallā cey ppārākavum Innilattukku Antarāyamum
koyil sabhaikkaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyānāna A Aruttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku E
ta neḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruveṅkaṭa Eḻuttu I Ippaṭikku pāratāyan śrīrāman Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu I
Digital edition of SII 24.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
